headline: Monster Beverage (MNST) Releases Q1 2026 Financial Results
summary: Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) is one of the Best Stocks Under $100 to Invest In Now. On May 7, the company released its Q1 2026 financial results, and net sales rose 26.9% to $2.35 billion compared to $1.85 billion in the same period of the last year.
